mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkin(course_id, teacher_id, code, start_time, end_time) VALUES(#{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{code}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM checkin WHERE code = #{code} AND end_time > #{now} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM checkin WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM checkin_record WHERE checkin_id = #{checkinId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM checkin_record WHERE checkin_time >= #{start} AND checkin_time < #{end}
SELECT * FROM checkin_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
